title: Part 7 – Entraînement 3 : publicités, avis & divers
instructions: Lisez chaque passage et répondez aux questions.

items.passage:
ADVERTISEMENT — FlexiOffice Solutions

Tired of paying for unused office space? FlexiOffice offers flexible coworking memberships starting at just €99 per month.

Choose from three plans:
• Drop-in: €99/month — 10 days access per month
• Regular: €199/month — unlimited access, no dedicated desk
• Premium: €349/month — dedicated desk, storage locker, and meeting room credits (5 hours/month)

All plans include:
— High-speed Wi-Fi — Printing services — Coffee and tea — 24/7 building access

First month half-price for new members. Book a free tour at www.flexioffice.eu

questions.prompt: What is included in the Premium plan that is not in the Regular plan?
choices: A dedicated desk and meeting room credits
questions.explanation: Premium includes "dedicated desk, storage locker, and meeting room credits" — not in the Regular plan.

questions.prompt: How many days per month does the Drop-in plan allow?
questions.explanation: "Drop-in: €99/month — 10 days access per month".

questions.prompt: What offer is available for new members?
choices: Two months for the price of one
A free trial for one week
questions.explanation: "First month half-price for new members".

items.passage:
From: Lena Strauss
To: Customer Support
Subject: Complaint — Conference Room Booking System

Dear Support Team,

I am writing to express my frustration with your online conference room booking system.

On three separate occasions this month, I successfully completed a booking online, received a confirmation email, but arrived to find the room already occupied. On two of these occasions, staff at reception were unable to find any record of my booking in their system.

This has caused significant disruption to client meetings, which is entirely unacceptable. I would appreciate an urgent investigation into why confirmed bookings are not being reflected in the physical booking system. I also request a written explanation and formal apology within five business days.

questions.prompt: What problem did Lena experience?
choices: She was charged twice for a room
Her confirmed bookings were not showing in the physical system
She was denied access to the building
Her meeting was cancelled without notice
questions.explanation: "received a confirmation email, but arrived to find the room already occupied" and "staff... unable to find any record of my booking".

questions.prompt: How many times did this problem occur?
questions.explanation: "On three separate occasions this month".

questions.prompt: What does Lena request?
choices: A written explanation and apology within five days
A phone call from the manager
questions.explanation: "I also request a written explanation and formal apology within five business days".

items.passage:
PRODUCT LAUNCH ANNOUNCEMENT

Introducing the DataSync Pro — the next generation of enterprise data synchronisation software.

Key features:
• Real-time synchronisation across unlimited devices
• End-to-end encryption for maximum data security
• Compatible with all major cloud platforms including AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud
• Automated backup every 15 minutes
• Centralised admin dashboard for IT teams

Launch offer: 30% off annual subscriptions purchased before March 31st. Pricing starts at €49/month per user for teams of up to 20. Volume discounts available for larger teams.

Request a free 14-day trial at www.datasyncpro.com

questions.prompt: How often does the automated backup run?
questions.explanation: "Automated backup every 15 minutes".

questions.prompt: What is the launch discount?
questions.explanation: "30% off annual subscriptions purchased before March 31st".

questions.prompt: What is offered before committing to a subscription?
choices: A demo with a sales consultant
questions.explanation: "Request a free 14-day trial".

items.passage:
PROPERTY LISTING — For Sale

Modern Commercial Unit — 238 sq.m.
Location: Parkside Business Quarter, Unit 14

This bright and modern commercial unit is ideal for office, retail, or light industrial use. The unit is fully fitted with air conditioning, a kitchenette, two bathrooms, and an open-plan workspace. There is also a private parking area for 6 vehicles.

Asking price: €320,000
Service charge: €2,800/year
Available immediately

Note: Planning permission for signage is included in the sale. A structural survey was completed in January and is available upon request.

Contact: DawnProperty Agency — 01 888 4400

questions.prompt: What types of use is the unit suitable for?
questions.explanation: "ideal for office, retail, or light industrial use".

questions.prompt: What is included in the sale besides the property?
questions.explanation: "Planning permission for signage is included in the sale".

questions.prompt: What document is available upon request?
choices: A structural survey completed in January
questions.explanation: "A structural survey was completed in January and is available upon request".

items.passage:
RESTAURANT REVIEW — Chez Laurent
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

I celebrated a team dinner here last week for twelve people and it could not have gone better. The private dining room was elegant and spacious, the service was attentive without being intrusive, and the food was exceptional.

Highlights: the duck confit starter, the slow-roasted lamb main, and the chocolate fondant dessert. The sommelier's wine pairing suggestions were spot-on.

The set menu for groups was €68 per person, including three courses and a glass of wine. For the quality and experience on offer, this is outstanding value.

I would not hesitate to recommend Chez Laurent for any corporate or celebratory occasion.

questions.prompt: What was the occasion for the visit?
questions.explanation: "I celebrated a team dinner here last week".

questions.prompt: What does the group set menu include?
choices: Two courses and a glass of wine
Three courses and a glass of wine
questions.explanation: "set menu for groups was €68 per person, including three courses and a glass of wine".

questions.prompt: What does the reviewer say about the price?
choices: It was too expensive for the quality
It was reasonable but not exceptional
It was outstanding value for the experience
questions.explanation: "For the quality and experience on offer, this is outstanding value".

items.passage:
HEALTH & WELLNESS NEWSLETTER

Tips for Staying Healthy During Long Business Trips

1. Stay hydrated: Cabin air is very dry. Drink water regularly, especially on long-haul flights, and avoid excessive caffeine and alcohol.

2. Move regularly: Set a timer to stand or walk for five minutes every hour during flights or long car journeys.

3. Maintain your sleep schedule: Try to adjust to the local time zone as soon as you arrive. Avoid napping on arrival day if possible.

4. Choose healthy meals: Airport and hotel menus often have hidden salt and sugar. Look for grilled options and salads when possible.

5. Exercise: Many hotels have gyms. Even a 20-minute workout can improve energy levels and reduce jet lag.

questions.prompt: What are travellers advised to avoid?
questions.explanation: "avoid excessive caffeine and alcohol".

questions.prompt: What is the advice about napping?
choices: Take a nap as soon as you arrive
Avoid napping on arrival day if possible
questions.explanation: "Avoid napping on arrival day if possible".

questions.prompt: How long is the recommended minimum workout?
questions.explanation: "Even a 20-minute workout can improve energy levels".

items.passage:
WORKSHOP FEEDBACK FORM — SUMMARY
Workshop: Effective Business Writing
Date: September 19th | Participants: 22

Overall satisfaction: 4.3 / 5

Highlights:
• 91% of participants said the workshop improved their confidence in writing formal emails
• 85% said the section on structuring reports was the most valuable
• The interactive exercises were rated highly by 88% of respondents

Areas for improvement:
• 40% felt the workshop was too short (3 hours)
• 25% requested more focus on writing for non-native English speakers

Recommendation: Run a follow-up session of at least 4 hours, with dedicated time for non-native speaker support.

questions.prompt: What did 91% of participants say?
choices: The interactive exercises were the best part
Their confidence in writing formal emails improved
questions.explanation: "91% of participants said the workshop improved their confidence in writing formal emails".

questions.prompt: What was the main criticism of the workshop?
questions.explanation: "40% felt the workshop was too short (3 hours)".

questions.prompt: What is the recommendation for the follow-up session?
choices: At least 4 hours with support for non-native speakers
A focus on report writing only
questions.explanation: "Run a follow-up session of at least 4 hours, with dedicated time for non-native speaker support".

items.passage:
INVITATION — Exclusive Client Reception

Dear Ms. Watanabe,

On behalf of Harrington Capital, we would like to invite you to our annual client reception, taking place on:

Date: Thursday, November 21st
Time: 6:30 p.m. – 9:00 p.m.
Venue: The Grand Ballroom, Meridian Hotel, 5 Harbour Lane

The evening will include a champagne reception, a keynote address by our Chief Investment Officer, and a cocktail dinner. Formal attire is requested.

Please RSVP by November 10th to events@harringtoncapital.com or call +353 1 200 3000. We are able to accommodate a guest if you wish to bring one.

We look forward to your company.

questions.prompt: What time does the event begin?
Who will deliver the keynote address?
questions.explanation: "a keynote address by our Chief Investment Officer".

questions.prompt: Can Ms. Watanabe bring a guest?
choices: No, the invitation is for one person only
Yes, up to two guests are allowed
Only if she RSVPs by phone
questions.explanation: "We are able to accommodate a guest if you wish to bring one".

items.passage:
NOTICE — Library Resource Centre Hours Update

Please note the following temporary changes to the Resource Centre opening hours, effective from Monday, October 7th to Friday, November 1st:

Monday–Thursday: 8:00 a.m. – 6:00 p.m. (previously open until 8:00 p.m.)
Friday: 8:00 a.m. – 4:00 p.m. (unchanged)
Saturday: CLOSED (previously open 10:00 a.m. – 2:00 p.m.)
Sunday: CLOSED (unchanged)

These changes are due to reduced staffing during the renovation period. Online resources and e-books remain available 24/7 through the portal.

We apologise for any inconvenience.

questions.prompt: What has changed about Monday–Thursday hours?
questions.explanation: Previously open until 8:00 p.m., now closing at 6:00 p.m. — earlier closing time.

questions.prompt: Why are the hours being reduced?
choices: Staffing is reduced during a renovation period
The centre is under new management
questions.explanation: "due to reduced staffing during the renovation period".

questions.prompt: What resource remains available 24/7?
choices: Online resources and e-books via the portal
questions.explanation: "Online resources and e-books remain available 24/7 through the portal".

items.passage:
MEMO — Interdepartmental

To: All Department Heads
From: Operations Director
Re: Supplier Review Meeting — Action Required

Following last quarter's supply disruptions, we are conducting a full review of our top ten suppliers. Each department head is asked to provide a written evaluation of their main suppliers by October 18th.

Evaluations should cover: delivery performance, product/service quality, communication responsiveness, and value for money. Please use the standard evaluation form, which can be downloaded from the procurement section of the intranet.

The completed evaluations will be discussed at the Supplier Review Meeting on October 25th. Attendance at this meeting is mandatory for all department heads.

questions.prompt: Why is the supplier review being conducted?
choices: As part of the annual planning process
questions.explanation: "Following last quarter's supply disruptions".

questions.prompt: By when must evaluations be submitted?
questions.explanation: "provide a written evaluation of their main suppliers by October 18th".

questions.prompt: What is the status of the October 25th meeting for department heads?
questions.explanation: "Attendance at this meeting is mandatory for all department heads".
